title: Satria Heroes: Revenge of the Darkness
overview: One year has passed since Satria Garuda Bima-X defeated VUDO and the earth is in peace again. Ray and Rena are rebuilding the Parallel World again. However, new evil forces attack and old enemies rise again to devastate the earth.
